name: gstack
description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

author.name: Garry Tan
author.background: Early eng/PM/designer at Palantir, cofounded Posterous (sold to Twitter), built Bookface (YC's internal network)

highlights.productivity: 810× code output increase vs 2013 (11,417 vs 14 logical lines/day)
highlights.shipped: 3 production services, 40+ features in 60 days (part-time while running YC)
highlights.efficiency: 240× entire 2013 year output in YTD 2026 (through April 18)

features.focus: Opinionated tools for startup founders and product builders

quote: I don't think I've typed like a line of code probably since December — Andrej Karpathy, March 2026
comparison: Peter Steinberger built OpenClaw (247K stars) essentially solo with AI agents
